events.title: ApoorvCTF
events.description: ApoorvCTF is the annual flagship online CTF organized by the CSY Club of IIIT Kottayam. The event is for 72 hrs, open to everyone and has something in store for beginners to seasoned experts. Challenges categories include web, OSINT, forensics, reverse engineering and more!

events.title: Chenda Melam
events.description: A ceremonial percussion procession that opens Apoorv with energy and movement across campus.

events.title: Inauguration of Apoorv
events.description: Official opening ceremony for Apoorv 2026 at Tapovan.

events.title: ArtExpo
events.description: Step into ArtEXPO, where creativity transforms spaces into ComicCon-inspired worlds! Design and showcase an original exhibit—art, models, props, or themed installations—and present your vision like creators at a ComicCon panel. Compete solo or in teams of up to three, captivate the judges with your concept, craftsmanship, and storytelling, and leave a lasting impression with an immersive, handmade creation.

events.title: GameVita 5.0
events.description: Welcome to Apoorv's GameVita 5.0! A 72-hour game dev extravaganza where you'll unleash your creativity, choose any engine or framework, and create the coolest software. The theme will be revealed at the start of the challenge, sparking your imagination and setting the stage for an epic journey.

events.title: GameVita 5.0
events.description: Welcome to Apoorv's GameVita 5.0! A 72-hour game dev extravaganza where you'll unleash your creativity, choose any engine or framework, and create the coolest software. The theme will be revealed at the start of the challenge, sparking your imagination and setting the stage for an epic journey.

events.title: GameVita 5.0
events.description: Welcome to Apoorv's GameVita 5.0! A 72-hour game dev extravaganza where you'll unleash your creativity, choose any engine or framework, and create the coolest software. The theme will be revealed at the start of the challenge, sparking your imagination and setting the stage for an epic journey.

events.title: E-Sports
events.description: Competitive gaming rounds featuring multiple titles.

events.title: MUN
events.description: Model United Nations (MUN) is a simulation of the United Nations where students act as global leaders, debate real-world issues, and draft resolutions. It builds public speaking, leadership, critical thinking, and teamwork, making it a perfect blend of intellect and confidence for a techno-cultural event.

events.title: METAMORPHOSIS
events.description: Step into the world of creative strategy! Metamorphosis challenges teams to reimagine a randomly assigned brand with a surprise theme and transform it into a bold new identity. Redesign logos, craft visuals, and present your concept through mockups and a poster—all within a limited time. A perfect blend of creativity, aesthetics, and presentation at Apoorv.

events.title: Pentagon
events.description: A flagship technical competition scheduled across multiple adjoining rooms.

events.title: Apoorv's Got Latent 2.0
events.description: Do you have what it takes to impress? At Apoorv's Got Latent 2.0, step into the spotlight and showcase your unique talents! Whether it's storytelling, music, dance, art, stand-up comedy, or something extraordinary, this is your moment to shine. Don't hold back—let's see what you've got!

events.title: Strings and Keys
events.description: Get ready to showcase your talent at Strings and Keys—Apoorv's instrumental competition! Whether you're a beginner or a pro, this is your chance to let your music shine. Open to all music lovers, the event offers exciting prizes, a stage to perform, and an experience to remember.

events.title: Aarohana
events.description: Experience the beauty and power of dance at Apoorv'26's AAROHANA. With colorful costumes and attractive lighting, the stage will come alive with energy and creativity. Our group dance event is filled with exciting music and energetic performances that showcase talent, teamwork, and passion. Get ready to enjoy an unforgettable show!

events.title: Tech Talk (E-Cell)
events.description: A curated session led by the entrepreneurship cell with speakers and practical insights.

events.title: ArtExpo
events.description: Step into ArtEXPO, where creativity transforms spaces into ComicCon-inspired worlds! Design and showcase an original exhibit—art, models, props, or themed installations—and present your vision like creators at a ComicCon panel. Compete solo or in teams of up to three, captivate the judges with your concept, craftsmanship, and storytelling, and leave a lasting impression with an immersive, handmade creation.

events.title: Masked Legends
events.description: Unleash your creativity at Masked Legends, where imagination turns into performance! Design a comic-inspired mask from scratch, pair it with your own costume, and bring your character to life through an electrifying cosplay and ramp walk. Go solo or form a team of up to three, create original or reimagined characters, and own the stage with style, confidence, and flair. Craft your legend and let the spotlight find you!

events.title: Quiz Quiz Hota Hai
events.description: LitSoc's Quiz Club presents Quiz Quiz Hota Hai, an offline quiz that challenges your knowledge, speed, and presence of mind across diverse domains of trivia. The quiz is open to all participants, including participants from all colleges across India. It consists of two rounds: prelims and finals, both of which will be offline. The first round will be a written one, with the top-scoring teams qualifying for the finals, consisting of a variety of rounds.

events.title: Pentagon
events.description: A flagship technical competition scheduled across multiple adjoining rooms.

events.title: Video Games Trivia Contest
events.description: The Video Games Trivia Contest is an exciting offline, on-campus team-based event that puts participants' knowledge of video games, gaming culture, and the industry to the test through a series of fast-paced and engaging rounds, including buzzer-based challenges, logical and puzzle-driven questions, general gaming trivia, and visual or audio recognition, with teams of 2–3 members competing for points based on speed and accuracy, and prizes awarded to the top three teams.

events.title: E-Sports
events.description: Competitive gaming rounds featuring multiple titles.

events.title: Techashy Hackathon
events.description: An intensive innovation sprint where teams collaborate to solve real-world problems by building creative and practical tech solutions within a limited timeframe.

events.title: Combined Hackathon
events.description: A multi-room hackathon block for build, demo, and evaluation rounds.

events.title: Eka
events.description: EKA is the Annual Solo Dance Event of Apoorv'26, celebrating rhythm, grace, and individuality. This event offers a platform for solo performers to showcase their passion, creativity, and technical prowess through dance. Participants are encouraged to explore diverse styles, blend genres, and present performances that reflect their unique artistic expression. EKA is not just a competition—it's a stage for innovation and self-expression.

events.title: Beyond the Harmony
events.description: Ready to let your voice shine at Beyond the Harmony? This is your stage to showcase your vocal talent and unleash your creativity. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, it's your time to shine! The event offers a chance to perform, win exciting prizes, and be part of an inspiring and captivating musical experience.

events.title: Vogue Fusion
events.description: Gear up to dazzle the world with your talent! The fusion wear combines elements from different cultures and eras, creating unique and versatile outfits. The vogue fusion is the chance to show your unique fusion of different styles and let people be amazed with your outfits. Let's add beauty to Apoorv and light up our campus with our outfits!

events.title: Prose & Cons
events.description: Online prose and short story writing competition. Word limit of 500 words.

events.title: The Reel Multiverse
events.description: Step into the spotlight with The Reel Multiverse—an electrifying reel-making competition inspired by comics, superheroes, cosplay, and pop culture, as part of APOORV – Comic Con Themed College Fest, where participants create short, visually exciting reels that capture the true ComicCon spirit while creatively promoting APOORV, bringing iconic characters to life, exploring alternate universes, and letting imagination rule the multiverse.

events.title: Synapse
events.description: SYNAPSE is where creativity meets the lens, inviting photographers to go beyond pictures through three compelling themes—Abstract, Macro & Product, and Emotions (Candid Special Feature)—capturing striking patterns, intricate details, and raw human expressions that speak for themselves, with participants submitting up to two photographs per theme for a curated exhibition where shortlisted works are displayed on canvas, opened to public QR-based voting alongside judges' evaluation, making SYNAPSE not just a competition but a celebration of perspective, emotion, and creative vision.

events.title: Chromus
events.description: CHROMUS is a silent videography challenge at APOORV Fest that celebrates the art of pure visual storytelling, where teams create a cinematic short film (maximum 2 minutes) based on a randomly assigned mystery emotion, using only visuals and sound design—no dialogue, subtitles, or text—pushing creators to express feelings through light, framing, motion, editing, and atmosphere, and proving that when words fade, emotions speak loudest through the lens.

events.title: Slam Dunk!
events.description: An open poetry and play slam where you can perform in teams of 1-3. You are allowed to perform original literary work, play excerpts, and dialogue sets. You must perform for at least 2 minutes up to 4 minutes maximum.

events.title: The Culling Games
events.description: The Culling Games is a high-energy, multi-round anime competition designed to test knowledge, strategy, and speed. The event begins with a quiz featuring mixed formats such as MCQs, one-word answers etc. The top six teams advance to a round of 'Guess Who' where teams must strategically identify their assigned anime character by asking minimal questions and making calculated guesses. The three most efficient teams move on to the final round — an anime-themed Family Feud showdown.

events.title: E-Sports
events.description: Competitive gaming rounds hosted as part of the Apoorv e-sports lineup.

events.title: Combined Hackathon
events.description: A multi-room hackathon block for build, demo, and evaluation rounds.

events.title: Rapid Dumb Charades
events.description: Get ready for a fun-filled, fast-paced movie guessing challenge where teamwork, expressions, and quick thinking lead the way to victory, as teams race against time to guess as many movies as possible from randomly provided chits in their preferred language, with members acting in a strict cyclic order to ensure equal participation, earning points for every correct guess, and battling it out to claim the top spot in this exciting, laughter-packed competition!

events.title: ArtExpo
events.description: Step into ArtEXPO, where creativity transforms spaces into ComicCon-inspired worlds! Design and showcase an original exhibit—art, models, props, or themed installations—and present your vision like creators at a ComicCon panel. Compete solo or in teams of up to three, captivate the judges with your concept, craftsmanship, and storytelling, and leave a lasting impression with an immersive, handmade creation.

events.title: Taal Tarangah
events.description: Experience the ultimate showdown at Apoorv '26 – Final Round, where the top teams battle for the championship title in a high-energy dance face-off at IIIT Kottayam. Each team of five, including at least one female member, will deliver electrifying performances across five dynamic tracks of different genres. With powerful choreography, expressive storytelling, and unmatched stage presence, the finalists will light up the stage in one unforgettable round. Get ready for an intense clash of rhythm, passion, and creativity as we crown the champions of Apoorv '26!

events.title: Deepak Mourya Live
events.description: A special live performance slot on the final evening lineup.

events.title: Vogue Fusion
events.description: Gear up to dazzle the world with your talent! The fusion wear combines elements from different cultures and eras, creating unique and versatile outfits. The vogue fusion is the chance to show your unique fusion of different styles and let people be amazed with your outfits. Let's add beauty to Apoorv and light up our campus with our outfits!

events.title: Concert
events.description: Closing-night concert at the college ground.

events.title: Call of Duty Mobile
events.description: COD Mobile at Apoorv 2026 will offer team-based multiplayer matches following standard esports-style rules and formats.

events.title: Free Fire
events.description: Apoorv 26's Free Fire competitions showcase intense battles where teams from around the world compete in high-energy tournaments. With a focus on strategy, precision, and survival, the event promises an electrifying experience for both participants and spectators.

events.title: Clash Royale
events.description: Clash Royale at Apoorv 2026 will be a 1v1 tournament where individual players compete using their own decks in organized rounds.

events.title: BGMI
events.description: Apoorv 26's BGMI competitions feature teams from around the world competing in exciting tournaments. The focus is on teamwork, communication, and skill, making it an intense and competitive game for both players and fans.

events.title: 48 Hour Flicks
events.description: 48 Hour Flicks is an intense filmmaking challenge where teams create a complete short film in just 48 hours. From scripting to shooting and editing, it's a true test of creativity, teamwork, and time management. Impress the judges and make every second count!

events.title: The Movie Maze
events.description: Movie Maze is a fast-paced team challenge where your movie knowledge meets sharp observation and logic. Crack movie-based clues across multiple levels, race against time, and score points with every correct deduction. Think fast, decode smart, and prove you're the ultimate movie mastermind!

events.title: Code Heist
events.description: Code Heist is a high-stakes cyber mystery where teams must uncover a hidden phrase to unlock a mission against a rogue network. With time ticking and clues concealed across a glitching control room, only sharp minds can stop the breach before it's too late.

events.title: Drama Performance
events.description: A theatrical performance showcase by the Drama Club at the main ground.

events.title: CONCERT CLG(Reverb)
events.description: College concert featuring Reverb

events.title: DJ Night
events.description: An electrifying DJ performance at the main ground to energize the evening.

events.title: Game Art Design Contest
events.description: An online game art design competition for creative game artists and designers.
